question: Q7: What buying signals mark a DM thread as ready for the meeting ask, and after how many exchanges should the ask happen?
method: exa-direct (NotebookLM auth expired 2026-07-04; synthesized from full-text sources in _research/exa/contents/, import to notebook pending re-login)
answer: See references/research-synthesis.md section 'Q7: Buying Signals + When to Ask for the Call'. Headline: booking window opens at ~11 total messages = 5-6 prospect replies (SetSmart 828K study); plateau past ~40 messages; validates the ask-by-6-exchanges advance trigger.
